title: lastrea roraimensis
intro: Lastrea roraimensis, also known as the Roraima fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae and is endemic to the Roraima region of South America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lastrea roraimensis include the potential treatment of various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote healing. Herbal preparations of Lastrea roraimensis include infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
